description: A perspective painting of a grand classical interior courtyard with tall Corinthian columns, marble steps, and a checkered floor. A small figure sits on the steps. A dog rests on the floor in the foreground. Through openings between columns, views of rooms and gardens are visible. The lighting creates dramatic contrasts between the shadowed interior and illuminated distant spaces. The architecture is rendered with precise mathematical perspective.

_meta.title: A Perspective View of the Courtyard of a House
